name: dev-docs
title: Dev Docs
description: Search language and framework documentation locally. Fast fuzzy search, inline rendered pages, open in browser with Ctrl+Enter.
author: abh80

commands.name: search-java
commands.title: Search Java Docs
commands.description: Search classes, methods, and packages in Java SE documentation

preferences.name: javaDefaultVersion
preferences.title: Default Java Version
preferences.description: Default Java SE version when opening Search Java Docs for the first time

preferences.name: cacheLimitMB
preferences.title: Page Cache Limit (MB)
preferences.description: Max disk space for cached rendered pages across all providers. LRU eviction.
